subject: Re: warp crashes on motion correction
body:
Hi Rafa,

was that with 1.0.6 or 1.0.7? Using 1.0.7, the movie goes through all steps 
(including BoxNet, which leaves 3.7 GB for everything else) without crashes 
on a 1080 with 8 GB. If it's 1.0.7 and it crashes specifically at the 
motion estimation step, reducing the upper frequency in the settings should 
help. I used 0.4 Ny.

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Thursday, April 18, 2019 at 11:52:11 AM UTC+2, 
r.fernandez.leiro@gmail.com wrote:
>
> Hi,
>
> Warp is crashing without any feedback/error message when I try to correct 
> motion on a Falcon3 movie (75 frames). I tried with different settings but 
> it crashes the same way in all
>
> I can see the memory used by GPU gets to 6.5GB and stays like that until 
> it crashes (first empties GPU then warp closes). So it doesn't seem to be 
> filling up the GPU...
>
> Latest WARP version running on win10
> 2x2070ti (8GB)
>
> I have sent you a link to a movie for you to be able to reproduce the 
> problem
>
> Thx!
>
> Rafa
>
